subcodes.title: Words to the Master's entourage, spoken on 1913-03-15
subcodes.first_line: The Cause of God will soon throw a great reverberation throughout the pillars of the world. It will embrace in its fold the East and the West. Its power will penetrate through every atom of creation.
subcodes.subjects: @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day, @growth of the Cause, @consolation and comfort
